title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2pc Pullback Race Cars Toy Vehicles Set for Boys Age 3 and Up
description:

Sonic the Hedgehog 2pc Pullback Race Cars Toy Vehicles Set for Boys Age 3 and Up

Race into Action with Sonic & Knuckles!

Get ready to race with the 2PC Sonic the Hedgehog Race Cars set! Featuring the iconic Sonic and Knuckles in their signature race cars, this officially licensed set brings the high-speed excitement of the Sonic universe to life. With pullback action, no batteries are needed—just pull, release, and watch these racers zoom off at top speed!

Key Features

  • 2PC SONIC RACE CARS - Officially licensed Sonic the Hedgehog and Knuckles Cars
  • PULLBACK ACTION - Cars accelerate with pullback friction; No batteries required
  • DETAILED VEHICLES - Characters and vehicles meticulously sculpted and designed
  • SUPER GRIP TIRES - Tires feature rubber grips for a smooth ride; no air needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed; Material: Durable plastic; Age rec: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SON2PKCS
  • UPC: 698143990779
  • Color: Multi-Color

Pullback Power

Experience the thrill of friction-powered speed! Simply pull back and let Sonic and Knuckles take off, racing ahead without the need for batteries.

Incredible Detail

Each car is meticulously designed, from Sonic’s speedy style to Knuckles’ tough look. These cars are built for fans and collectors alike!

Super Grip Tires

With rubberized tires for ultimate traction, these race cars glide smoothly and stay on track, giving you an exciting, controlled ride every time.

Specifications

Perfect for racing or display, the Sonic & Knuckles Race Cars are a must-have for any Sonic fan! Grab yours today and let the races begin!
